prompt: Create a realistic handmade enamel souvenir magnet inspired by the uploaded photo. Premium luxury travel collectible with realistic 3D metal depth, recessed enamel surfaces, ultra-thin selective gold contours, embossed gold edges, soft studio lighting, subtle reflections, realistic enamel texture, and gentle shadows. Feature the person from the reference photo as the main subject, but change the outfit, styling, and pose completely. Place the character within an iconic Indian travel scene featuring the Taj Mahal, traditional architecture, lush gardens, and elegant cultural elements. Magnet shape: organic sculptural silhouette inspired by the Taj Mahal outline, asymmetrical contour, no rectangular or square frame. Style: cinematic luxury tourism souvenir, museum-store quality, refined minimalism, highly realistic handcrafted enamel magnet, not a flat illustration, not vector art, not cartoon. Color palette: deep emerald green background matching dominant tones from the original image, with warm gold metal accents and rich enamel colors. Typography below the magnet: INDIA INCREDIBLE INDIA Elegant luxury serif font, all caps, very wide letter spacing, centered alignment, minimalist premium travel-poster aesthetic. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic, collectible souvenir product photography, shallow depth of field, soft glare, premium studio presentation, 3:4 vertical ratio.
